CustomField.description: Length of string in Requested Reviewers with '(Required)', less length of string without '(Required)', divided by 10
CustomField.formula: IF( CONTAINS( copado__Requested_Reviewers__c, copado__Username__c&' (Required)'), ((LEN( copado__Requested_Reviewers__c )- LEN( SUBSTITUTE( copado__Requested_Reviewers__c, '(Required)', '') )) / 10) - 1, (LEN( copado__Requested_Reviewers__c )- LEN( SUBSTITUTE( copado__Requested_Reviewers__c, '(Required)', '') )) / 10)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Count of Required Reviewers requested; the PR Submitter's Reviews are not counted amongst PR Metrics.
CustomField.label: Total Reviewers Required
